figures.caption: TABLE I OVERALL FORECASTING PERFORMANCE ON PEMS04, PEMS07, AND PEMS08. THE BEST RESULT IS IN BOLD, AND THE SECOND-BEST RESULT IS UNDERLINED.
Fig. 2. Overview of the FAST framework. FAST uses multi-source input embedding, stacked Temporal-Spatial-Temporal (TST) blocks, and a skipconnected prediction head for multi-step forecasting.

Fig. 1. Motivation of FAST. (a) Traffic forecasting exhibits complex spatiotemporal dependencies. (b) Existing paradigms trade off local spatial bias, global dependency modeling, and scalability. (c) FAST combines temporal attention and Mamba-based spatial propagation in a TST design.
